classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to fetch a repository's discussion categories.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 */
classData.description:
Query to fetch a repository's discussion categories.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String!
  • $repo: String!
classData.name: GET_REPO_AND_DISCUSSION_CATEGORIES

classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to fetch a discussion's GraphQL ID (used for mutations like Comments).
 * Note: Discussions are identified by 'number', just like issues/PRs.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 * - $number: Int!
 */
classData.description:
Query to fetch a discussion's GraphQL ID (used for mutations like Comments). Note: Discussions are identified by 'number', just like issues/PRs.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String!
  • $repo: String!
  • $number: Int!
classData.name: GET_DISCUSSION_ID

classData.comment:
/**
 * Query to fetch a discussion conversation, including top-level comments and replies.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 * - $discussionNumber: Int!
 * - $maxComments: Int!
 * - $maxReplies: Int!
 */
classData.description:
Query to fetch a discussion conversation, including top-level comments and replies.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String!
  • $repo: String!
  • $discussionNumber: Int!
  • $maxComments: Int!
  • $maxReplies: Int!
classData.name: GET_DISCUSSION_CONVERSATION

classData.comment:
/**
 * Basic query to fetch discussions for local synchronization.
 * Includes nested comments and replies.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 * - $limit: Int!
 * - $cursor: String
 * - $maxComments: Int!
 * - $maxReplies: Int!
 */
classData.description:
Basic query to fetch discussions for local synchronization. Includes nested comments and replies.

Variables required:

  • $owner: String!
  • $repo: String!
  • $limit: Int!
  • $cursor: String
  • $maxComments: Int!
  • $maxReplies: Int!
classData.name: FETCH_DISCUSSIONS_FOR_SYNC

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Single-discussion variant of {@link FETCH_DISCUSSIONS_FOR_SYNC} for the force-refetch path.
 *
 * Returns the identical sync node shape (body + comments + nested replies + frontmatter fields) for
 * ONE discussion by number, bypassing the bulk delta-by-`updatedAt` gating so a known-stale local
 * mirror can be force-re-rendered from current GitHub state.
 *
 * Variables required:
 * - $owner: String!
 * - $repo: String!
 * - $number: Int!
 * - $maxComments: Int!
 * - $maxReplies: Int!
 */
classData.summary:
Single-discussion variant of {@link FETCH_DISCUSSIONS_FOR_SYNC} for the force-refetch path.

Returns the identical sync node shape (body + comments + nested replies + frontmatter fields) for
ONE discussion by number, bypassing the bulk delta-by-`updatedAt` gating so a known-stale local
mirror can be force-re-rendered from current GitHub state.

Variables required:
- $owner: String!
- $repo: String!
- $number: Int!
- $maxComments: Int!
- $maxReplies: Int!
classData.name: FETCH_SINGLE_DISCUSSION_FOR_SYNC
